'''Mecht''' was a middle-aged [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] soldier who served as a member of [[Red Hand Squadron]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Prior to his service in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]], he was a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] until he was freed. He participated in the [[Capture of the Helot's Shackle|capture]] of [[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|''Helot's Shackle'']]. After the mission was a success, he participated in the [[Battle of Toprawa]] where, he along with Red Squadron, was wiped out, as they formed the rearguard for the theft of the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] [[Death Star plans/Legends|Plans]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
